title: CodeGrind: AI-Assisted DSA Practice with Real-Time Guidance
summary: Highlight the AI-assisted problem-solving guidance and real-time code execution in CodeGrind's DSA practice flow, showcasing problem-solving with an Azure OpenAI-backed assistant and live evaluation.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an AI assistant and real-time Judge0 execution to guide you from problem description to working solution, all inside a competitive, gamified learning space.
cta: Try a challenge with AI help now on CodeGrind
visual_brief: A short 15–20 second motion clip showing a developer typing in CodeGrind’s editor, AI assistant responses appearing as chat bubbles, and live code results validating a solution with a green success indicator. Include subtle cyberpunk UI cues and CodeGrind branding.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
